data.keyword: Find a Louisville therapist who accepts Medicaid.
data.tag: lmhg ai mode expanded Find a Louisville therapist who accepts Medicaid.

result.keyword: Find a Louisville therapist who accepts Medicaid.

items.markdown:
Several therapists and counseling services in Louisville, KY, accept Medicaid. According to [Psychology Today's Medicaid therapist directory](https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/therapists/ky/louisville?category=medicaid) , some providers include:[[1]](https://zencare.co/us/kentucky/louisville/louisville-jefferson-county/therapists/insurance/medicaid)[[2]](https://paid.care/guides/medicaid-therapists-accessing-quality-mental-health-care)

- **Mindive** 
- **Lifestrings Mental Health and Well-Being, LLC** 
- **Haven Family Counseling** 
- **Bridge the Gap Addiction and Mental Health Service** 
- **Blue Moon Therapy** 
- **Counseling Unlimited & Virtual Visits** [[1]](https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/therapists/ky/louisville?category=medicaid)[[2]](https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/therapists/haven-family-counseling-louisville-ky/763897)[[3]](https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/therapists/blue-moon-therapy-louisville-ky/813431)

Other options, including in-person and online, include:

- **Tyler Horn, MSSW, LCSW** (Louisville) – Specializes in parental support, according to Therapist.com.
- **Meredith Cundiff, LPCC** (Louisville) – Licensed Professional Counselor, via Therapist.com.
- **Zencare** lists online therapists who accept Medicaid and serve the [Louisville-Jefferson County area](https://zencare.co/us/kentucky/louisville/louisville-jefferson-county/therapists/insurance/medicaid).[[1]](https://therapist.com/clinician/meredith-cundiff-113953/)[[2]](https://zencare.co/us/kentucky/louisville/louisville-jefferson-county/therapists/insurance/medicaid)

**Key Tips for Using Medicaid:** 

- **Verify Coverage:** Contact your managed care plan to confirm coverage, as networks can vary [as noted on Mental Health Match](https://mentalhealthmatch.com/browse-therapists/kentucky/louisville/medicaid).
- **Check Availability:** Always ask if the therapist is currently accepting new Medicaid patients when you call.[[1]](https://manhattanmentalhealthcounseling.com/does-medicaid-cover-therapy/)[[2]](https://joingroups.com/how-to-find-an-online-suboxone-doctor-or-clinic-that-accepts-medicaid/)[[3]](https://mentalhealthmatch.com/browse-therapists/kentucky/louisville/medicaid)

Would you like me to look for therapists who specialize in a **specific area** (such as trauma, anxiety, or addiction) or who offer **in-person sessions**?
